speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys in the ship, you glance over where the chains are currently pulling taut. You watch as a series of humanoid figures wearing dark, dark green and black leathers, their faces partially obscured, rush onto the ship, weapons drawn. I'm gonna ask everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And you watch as she arcs out of the fog towards you, reaching her hand out in your direction.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, grab my hero's hand. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tary! I want to apologize right now. Because in this moment, I am a damsel and I am in distress! (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So cross it off, bitch. Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, just a strength modifier bonus.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. All right. You grab her, and you-- it pulls you from two points, but you had managed to keep your hold and grasp Keyleth, now dangling from your arm.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I did a lot of pushups today! Ow, ow, ow, ow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is. You're very sore-- (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are very sore, but you manage to get her right up to the edge of the ship, and she manages to get a grip onto the edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You were. Today, in this moment, for this 30 seconds of time--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna be in the middle of this for months.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm gonna be right in the middle of this. For months. Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Did it leave a little stain?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You look up at this point and you can just barely see the chain, and you watch as a couple shapes, just barely visible through the fog, are now leaping across the chain towards your ship. So--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I give a heads up. Heads up, heads up, people. Incoming forces, coming your way!
